prompt: Update the description of the 'api-rate-limiting' entry to mention we increased the limit to 200 requests per minute
expected_output: The agent should edit only the description field of the existing api-rate-limiting entry.
assertions: Agent reads the existing entry before editing
Agent updates only the description, preserving other fields
The updated description mentions 200 requests per minute

prompt: Replace the entire content of the 'deployment-strategy' entry with our new blue-green deployment approach
expected_output: The agent should perform a full replacement of the entry body with the new blue-green deployment content.
assertions: Agent replaces the full body content of the entry
The new content describes blue-green deployment
Agent confirms the update was successful

prompt: Update the note about logging conventions, or create it if it doesn't exist yet
expected_output: The agent should first check if the entry exists, then edit if found or create if not.
assertions: Agent checks for existence of the logging conventions entry
If found, agent edits the existing entry
If not found, agent creates a new entry instead

prompt: Add a section about error handling to the existing 'api-design-guidelines' entry, keep everything else
expected_output: The agent should append the error handling section to the existing body without removing current content.
assertions: Agent reads the current entry body first
Agent appends the new error handling section to the body

prompt: Change the tags on 'database-migration' from 'backend' to 'backend' and 'infrastructure'
expected_output: The agent should update the tags on the entry, adding 'infrastructure' while keeping 'backend'.
assertions: Agent modifies the tags of the existing entry
The updated entry has both 'backend' and 'infrastructure' tags
Agent does not modify the entry body or description
